name: revit_create_negative_block
description: Creates a generic-model family block representing the negative volume of a target element within a boundary.

target_element_id.description: Element with solids to subtract from the block volume

boundary_curve_ids.description: XY-plane curve element ids forming a closed boundary

family_template_path.description: Path to GenericModel.rft; defaults to application family template path

notes: Replace PickObject calls with element ids; returns loaded family instance id on success.
